name: BARFRESH FOOD GROUP INC.
business: The company manufactures and distributes ready-to-drink and ready-to-blend frozen beverages and food, including smoothies, shakes, frappes and juice pops. After acquiring Arps Dairy in October 2025, it also sells raw and processed milk to a single customer. The products are sold primarily to school districts through USDA programs and to U.S. military bases.
sellsTo: Single customer for raw and processed milk

exposures.sentence: The Company is engaged in the manufacturing and distribution of ready-to-drink and ready-to-blend frozen beverages and food, including smoothies, shakes, frappes and juice pops.

catalysts.sentence: On October 3, 2025, we acquired Arps Dairy, Inc., an Ohio corporation
In December 2025, we were granted $2,400,000 to fund up to 50% of the cost of new equipment purchases and installation for the New Facility.
In February 2026, $400,000 of Arps selling shareholder advances were converted into shares of our common stock.
In March 2026, we raised $7,528,000 through the sale of convertible promissory notes.
